steps.title: Identify the subject structure
steps.content: The subject is “Amplifying the voices and experiences of Black soldiers,” a gerund phrase (the -ing form acting as a noun). Gerund phrases are singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to take a singular verb, so “was” is the only singular option. “Were,” “are,” and “have been” are all plural and violate this rule. That matches choice D — D is correct.
